Uses of Interface
au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function.CollectionTransform

Packages that use CollectionTransform
Package
Description
au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.collection
 
au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function
 
au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function.provider
 

  • Uses of CollectionTransform in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.collection

    Methods in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.collection with parameters of type CollectionTransform
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection
    Collection.project(CollectionTransform transform)
    Projects each element of this collection using the specified transform, flattening the results.
    Collection
    Collection.repeat(CollectionTransform transform, int maxDepth)
    Recursively traverses this collection using the specified transform, collecting results with equality-based deduplication.
    Collection
    Collection.repeatAll(CollectionTransform transform, int maxDepth, boolean allowSelfReference)
    Recursively traverses this collection using the specified transform, collecting all results without deduplication.

  • Uses of CollectionTransform in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function

    Methods in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function that return CollectionTransform
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CollectionTransform
    CollectionTransform.requireBooleanSingleton()
    Ensures that the result of the transformation is a singleton boolean collection.

  • Uses of CollectionTransform in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function.provider

    Methods in au.csiro.pathling.fhirpath.function.provider with parameters of type CollectionTransform
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static BooleanCollection
    ExistenceFunctions.exists(Collection input, CollectionTransform criteria)
    Returns true if the input collection has any elements (optionally filtered by the criteria), and false otherwise.
    static Collection
    FilteringAndProjectionFunctions.repeat(Collection input, CollectionTransform expression, EvaluationContext context)
    Recursively evaluates a projection expression on each item in the input collection, adding results to the output only if they are not already present as determined by the equals ( =) operator.
    static Collection
    FilteringAndProjectionFunctions.repeatAll(Collection input, CollectionTransform expression, EvaluationContext context)
    Recursively evaluates a projection expression on each item in the input collection, adding all results to the output without deduplication.
    static Collection
    FilteringAndProjectionFunctions.select(Collection input, CollectionTransform expression)
    Returns a collection containing the result of evaluating the projection expression for each item in the input collection.
    static Collection
    UtilityFunctions.trace(Collection input, StringCollection name, CollectionTransform projection, EvaluationContext context)
    Adds a string representation of the input collection to the diagnostic log, using the name argument as the label in the log.
    static Collection
    FilteringAndProjectionFunctions.where(Collection input, CollectionTransform expression)
    Returns a collection containing only those elements in the input collection for which the stated criteria expression evaluates to true.
